known_limitations: No built-in OCR — scanned PDFs produce empty output
pdfminer.six backend strips heading structure from PDFs
Complex multi-column PDF layouts may merge into garbled text
Table extraction from PDFs is unreliable
DOCX quality is significantly better than PDF quality

warnings: Output is near-empty (29 chars). Likely a scanned PDF or unsupported layout.
Scanned PDF detected (no text layer). MarkItDown will produce empty output. This is a known limitation — MarkItDown requires markitdown-ocr plugin + LLM vision client for scanned files.
Output is near-empty (1 chars). Likely a scanned PDF or unsupported layout.
No Markdown headings found in PDF output. MarkItDown's pdfminer.six backend strips heading structure from PDFs. Section detection will be degraded for the LLM scoring step.
Output is near-empty (0 chars). Likely a scanned PDF or unsupported layout.
